step.name: draft
step.action: Set quarterly revenue with per-line split + utilisation target + milestones + investment lines.

step.name: stress-test
step.action: Simulate downside scenario (-20% revenue); confirm cash runway holds.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit one-page artefact; share with sponsors / partners.

step.name: quarterly-checkpoint
step.action: Run checkpoint with variance + reason + action; only sponsor approves target shifts.
